title: Renovation backlog for college facilities hits new highs
content: The dollar value of deferred capital projects grew by 8% last year, according to the latest state of higher ed facilities report from Gordian.

title: Construction’s economic outlook is increasingly cloudy
content: Aside from the artificial intelligence buildout, the industry’s numbers have weakened. The boom “probably will end at some point. But not now,” said an economist.
